tasks.label: Kill and Build nes1
tasks.command: Stop-Process -Name nes1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; & 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\MSBuild.exe' 'C:\Work\nes1\src\nes1.sln' /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /t:Build /v:minimal

tasks.label: Force Kill and Build
tasks.command: Get-Process nes1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Property Id,Name,CPU; taskkill /F /IM nes1.exe; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; & 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\MSBuild.exe' 'C:\Work\nes1\src\nes1.sln' /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /t:Build /v:minimal

tasks.label: Build nes1 v2
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM nes1.exe 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-Process nes1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\MSBuild.exe' 'C:\Work\nes1\src\nes1.sln' /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /t:Build /v:minimal

tasks.label: Find scroll divergence start
tasks.command:
$frames = 240..246; foreach ($f in $frames) { $fn = '{0:D4}' -f $f; $n = (Get-Content "C:\Work
es1	est\mappy_out
es1_dense_out
es1_frame_$fn.txt" | Select-String 'v=').Line; $fc = (Get-Content "C:\Work
es1	est\mappy_out ceux_dense_out ceux_frame_$fn.txt" | Select-String 'v=').Line; if ($n -ne $fc) { Write-Host "F$fn DIFF: NES1=$n FCEUX=$fc" } else { Write-Host "F$fn SAME" } }

tasks.label: Find v changes in SL trace
Disasm around C72B
tasks.command:
# Dump 20 bytes of PRG ROM around 0xC72B by looking at the NES ROM
$rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Work\nes1\test\Mappy (Japan).nes')
# NES ROM: 16 byte header, then PRG ROM (16KB or 32KB)
# For NROM-256 (32KB), PRG starts at 0x10 and maps to 0x8000-0xFFFF
# Address 0xC72B = PRG offset 0xC72B - 0x8000 + 0x10 = 0x472B
$prgOffset = 0xC72B - 0x8000 + 0x10
Write-Host "PRG offset: 0x$('{0:X4}' -f $prgOffset)"
$bytes = $rom[$prgOffset..($prgOffset+30)]
$bytes | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ } | Write-Host -Separator ' '

tasks.label: Disasm C72B
tasks.command:
$rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Work\nes1\test\Mappy (Japan).nes')
$prg16k = $rom[4]; $chr8k = $rom[5]
Write-Host "PRG 16KB pages: $prg16k, CHR 8KB pages: $chr8k"
# For 2 PRG pages (32KB), maps to 0x8000-0xFFFF
# For 1 PRG page (16KB), maps to both 0x8000-0xBFFF and 0xC000-0xFFFF
$prgOffset = if ($prg16k -eq 2) { 0xC72B - 0x8000 + 0x10 } else { 0xC72B - 0xC000 + 0x10 }
Write-Host "PRG offset: 0x$('{0:X4}' -f $prgOffset)"
$bytes = $rom[$prgOffset..($prgOffset+30)]
$bytes | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ } | Write-Host -Separator ' '

Check cycle counts F244-247

es1	est\mappy_out

es1	est\mappy_out ceux_dense_out ceux_frame_$($f.ToString('0000')).txt" | Select-String 'cycles=').Line; Write-Host "F${f}: NES1=$nes1"; Write-Host "F${f}: FCEUX=$fceux"; Write-Host '' }

tasks.label: V register trace F246-255
tasks.command:
@(246, 247, 248, 249, 250, 251, 252, 253, 254, 255) | ForEach-Object { $f = $_; $n = (Get-Content "C:\Work
es1	est\mappy_out
es1_dense_out
es1_frame_$($f.ToString('0000')).txt" | Select-String 'v=.*t=.*fine_x').Line.Trim(); $fc = (Get-Content "C:\Work
es1	est\mappy_out ceux_dense_out ceux_frame_$($f.ToString('0000')).txt" | Select-String 'v=.*t=.*fine_x').Line.Trim(); Write-Host "F${f} NES1: $n"; Write-Host "F${f} FCEUX: $fc" }

tasks.label: Check failure pixel counts
tasks.command:
# Check F248 and F250 diff pixel counts from dense report
Select-String 'F0248|F0250|F0256|F0260' 'C:\Work\nes1\test\mappy_out\dense_report.html' | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim() }
